title: Searching for Files
drDigitalIntro:
With lots of files, you can search instead of hunting.
• The search box is in the top-right corner.
• Type part of a file's name.
• Only matching files show up. Let's find one.

steps.say: Instead of hunting, you can search. Click the Search box and type budget to find your budget file.
There it is! Double-click Budget.xlsx to open it.

drDigitalSuccess: You searched for 'budget' and the file manager found it instantly. Searching is the fastest way to find any file.
drDigitalHint: Click the glowing Search box in the top-right corner and type the word budget.
